title: stelis pendulata
intro: Stelis pendulata, also known as the pendulous stelis, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Stelis pendulata include its potential to treat various conditions, such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues, due to its antibacterial and antiviral properties. In herbal preparations, Stelis pendulata is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to address various health concerns.
